prompt: A high-end cinematic commercial photography shot of a muscular humanoid banana character standing in a dimly lit, moody wine cellar. The character has a realistic yellow banana peel body, a cartoonish face with thick black eyebrows and a wide toothy smile, and muscular human arms. He is wearing a red apron and elegantly holding a glass of red wine. To his right rests a dark glass bottle of red wine on a wooden surface, featuring a classic, elegant label that reads Maison Rouge B. with an illustration of a chateau. The background features blurred shelves filled with wine bottles, illuminated by sophisticated, dramatic lighting with deep red and brown tones. In the top left corner, elegant white Japanese typography displays the main tagline その一杯に、理由はある。 followed by a smaller subtitle 甘さではなく、余韻で選ぶ。. In the bottom left corner, tiny legal text reads "※お酒は20歳になってから". The bottom right corner features the brand name Maison Rouge B. in a clean serif font.
